title: AI Yellow Cartoon Sitcom
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a bright cartoon family-comedy portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a bright animated family-sitcom portrait. Preserve the subject's identity as closely as possible: keep the same number of people, facial structure, eyes, nose, mouth placement, hairstyle silhouette, pose, camera angle, framing, clothing colors, and scene context. Use yellow-tinted skin, bold outlines, flat cel shading, simplified cartoon forms, expressive faces, and clean prime-time TV-animation energy. The result should feel like the same real people reimagined as original cartoon characters, not as existing characters.
negative_prompt: existing cartoon characters, copied franchise characters, identity drift, changed face shape, changed hairstyle, different age, extra people, distorted faces, malformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, duplicate limbs, duplicate face, unrelated objects, text, captions, logos, watermarks, blurry, low quality, uncanny
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. bright cartoon sitcom style, bold outlines...
